entities.name: detection
entities.context: a process to identify conditions within V's knowledge system

entities.name: errors
entities.context: a condition in detection indicating failure

entities.name: exit_code
entities.context: a numerical code indicating the status of a process

entities.name: exception
entities.context: an error condition that disrupts normal processing

entities.name: failed
entities.context: a state indicating that a process did not complete successfully

entities.name: status
entities.context: the current state of a process

entities.name: complete
entities.context: a state indicating that a process has finished successfully

entities.name: resolved
entities.context: a condition where issues have been addressed successfully

relationships.context: errors are identified through the detection process
the exit_code indicates the result of the detection process
exceptions are potential outcomes detected in the process
a failed status is an outcome of the detection
status indicates whether a process is complete
resolved status indicates that all issues have been addressed
